verses.sanskrit: ततः सीतामुपागम्य राक्षस्यो विकृताननाः ।परुषं परुषा नार्य ऊचुस्ता वाक्यमप्रियम् ।। ५.२२.१।।।।
verses.text:
Ravana listening to Seetha's words which were harsh thereafter replied to Seetha unpleasant words 
which are seen to be pleasant.

verses.sanskrit: किं त्वमन्तःपुरे सीते सर्वभूतमनोहरे ।महार्हशयनोपेते न वासमनुमन्यसे ।। ५.२२.२।।।।
verses.text:
"In whatever way gentle language is used to women in that way they will be under control. In whatever 
way men speak dear words, in that way they will be rejected."

verses.sanskrit: मानुषी मानुषस्यैव भार्यात्वं बहु मन्यसे ।प्रत्याहर मनो रामान्न त्वं जातु भविष्यसि ।। ५.२२.३।।।।
verses.text:
"In your matter desire which has risen up is subdueing my anger like horses running obtaining a 
bad path being subdued by a good charioteer."

verses.sanskrit: मानुषी मानुषं तं तु राममिच्छसि शोभने ।राज्याद्भ्रष्टमसिद्धार्थं विक्लवं तमनिन्दिते ।। ५.२२.४।।।।
verses.text:
"Desire of men is unfavourable. In which man desire is tied up, in that man there is compassion 
and fondness."

verses.sanskrit: राक्षसीनां वचः श्रुत्वा सीता पद्मनिभेक्षणा ।नेत्राभ्यामश्रुपूर्णाभ्यामिदं वचनमब्रवीत् ।। ५.२२.५।।।।
verses.text:
"O one with a beautiful face! For this reason although you are suitable to be killed and suitable 
to be humilaited, interested in Rama who is in sham exile, I am not killing you."

verses.sanskrit: यदिदं लोकविद्विष्टमुदाहरथ सङ्गताः ।नैतन्मनसि वाक्यं मे किल्बिषं प्रतितिष्ठति ।। ५.२२.६।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha! Here whatever harsh words you are speaking about me, because of those words, you are 
suitable to be horribly slayed."

verses.sanskrit: न मानुषी राक्षसस्य भार्या भवितुमर्हति ।कामं खादत मां सर्वा न करिष्यामि वो वचः ।दीनो वा राज्यहीनो वा यो मे भर्ता स मे गुरुः ।। ५.२२.७।।।।
verses.text:
The king of ogres Ravana speaking thus to Seetha, full of anger and fury spoke subsequent word 
to Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: सीताया वचनं श्रुत्वा राक्षस्यः क्रोधमूर्छिताः ।भर्त्सयन्ति स्म परुषैर्वाक्यै रावणचोदिताः ।। ५.२२.८।।।।
verses.text:
"O Seetha with best complexion! Whatever limit has been made by me to you, those two months are 
protectable to me. Thereafter ascend my bed."

verses.sanskrit: अवलीनः स निर्वाक्यो हनुमाञ्शिंशपाद्रुमे ।सीतां सन्तर्जयन्तीस्ता राक्षसीरशृणोत्कपिः ।। ५.२२.९।।।।
verses.text: "Above two months you not desiring me as husband will be killed in my kitched for my breakfast."

verses.sanskrit: तामभिक्रम्य संरब्धा वेपमानां समन्ततः ।भृशं संलिलिहुर्दीप्तान्प्रलम्बदशनच्छदान् ।। ५.२२.१०।।।।
verses.text:
Seeing Seetha being frightened by Ravana those Deva and Gandharva maidens grieved with troubled 
eyes.

verses.sanskrit: ऊचुश्च परमक्रुद्धाः प्रगृह्याशु परश्वधान् ।नेयमर्हति भर्तारं रावणं राक्षसाधिपम् ।। ५.२२.११।।।।
verses.text:
Some in the way of lips and in like manner some others with faces and eyes consoled that Seetha 
frightened by that ogre.

verses.sanskrit: सा भर्त्स्यमाना भीमाभी राक्षसीभिर्वरानना ।सा बाष्पमपमार्जन्ती शिंशपां तामुपागमत् ।। ५.२२.१२।।।।
verses.text:
Consoled by them Seetha proud of virtuous conduct spoke words beneficial to self to the king of 
ogres Ravana.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तां शिंशपां सीता राक्षसीभिः समावृता ।अभिगम्य विशालाक्षी तस्थौ शोकपरिप्लुता ।। ५.२२.१३।।।।
verses.text:
"Whoever prevents you from these actions which are blameable, such a person interested in your 
welfare there is none. This is definite."

verses.sanskrit: तां कृशां दीनवदनां मलिनाम्बरधारिणीम् ।भर्त्सयां चक्रिरे भीमा राक्षस्यस्ताः समन्ततः ।। ५.२२.१४।।।।
verses.text:
"In all the three worlds except you who even by heart will desire me who am the wife of virtuous 
Rama like Sachi the wife of Indra."

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तां विनता नाम राक्षसी भीमदर्शना ।अब्रवीत्कुपिताकारा कराला निर्णतोदरी ।। ५.२२.१५।।।।
verses.text:
"O vile ogre! Whatever sinful word you spoke to me who is the wife of the great resplendent Rama, 
from that word where will you go to be released?"

verses.sanskrit: सीते पर्याप्तमेतावद्भर्तृस्नेहो निदर्शितः ।सर्वत्रातिकृतं भद्रे व्यसनायोपकल्पते ।। ५.२२.१६।।।।
verses.text:
"Like an elephant in rut and a hare at war in the forest, in the same way O vile one! Rama is like 
an elephant and you are said to be like a hare."

verses.sanskrit: परितुष्टास्मि भद्रं ते मानुषस्ते कृतो विधिः ।ममापि तु वचः पथ्यं ब्रुवन्त्याः कुरु मैथिलि ।। ५.२२.१७।।।।
verses.text:
"Such you are not shameful abusing the lord of Ikshvaku dynasty Rama. You are not getting Rama's 
matter so much."

verses.sanskrit: रावणं भज भर्तारं भर्तारं सर्वरक्षसाम् ।विक्रान्तं रूपवन्तं च सुरेशमिव वासवम् ।। ५.२२.१८।।।।
verses.text:
"O ignoble one! your these eyes which are cruel, crooked, which are black and reddish brown, which 
are seeing me, for what reason are they not falling down."

verses.sanskrit: दक्षिणं त्यागशीलं च सर्वस्य प्रियवादिनम् ।मानुषं कृपणं रामं त्यक्त्वा रावणमाश्रय ।। ५.२२.१९।।।।
verses.text:
"Thus speaking about me who am the wife of virtuous Rama and the daughter-in-law of Dasaratha how 
your tongue did not fall off."

verses.sanskrit: दिव्याङ्गरागा वैदेहि दिव्याभरणभूषिता ।अद्य प्रभृति सर्वेषां लोकानामीश्वरी भव ।अग्नेः स्वाहा यथा देवी शचीवेन्द्रस्य शोभने ।। ५.२२.२०।।।।
verses.text:
"O Ravana! Although you are suited to be burnt into ashes, not having the mandate of Rama and preserving 
austerity, I am not reducing you into ashes with my glory."

"Wise Rama's I am not capable of being abducted by you. This act has been made for your slaying. 
In this there is no doubt."

verses.sanskrit: एतदुक्तं च मे वाक्यं यदि त्वं न करिष्यसि ।अस्मिन्मुहूर्ते सर्वास्त्वां भक्षयिष्यामहे वयम् ।।५.२२.२२।।।।
verses.text:
"By you who is strong, brother of Kubera possessed of army, removing Rama for what reason abduction 
of wife has been done."

verses.sanskrit: अन्या तु विकटा नाम लम्बमानपयोधरा ।अब्रवीत्कुपिता सीतां मुष्टिमुद्यम्य गर्जती ।। ५.२२.२३।।।।
verses.text: King of rakshasas Ravana listening to Seetha's words turned around his cruel eyes and saw Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: बहून्यप्रतिरूपाणि वचनानि सुदुर्मते ।अनुक्रोशान्मृदुत्वाच्च सोढानि तव मैथिलि ।न च नः कुरुषे वाक्यं हितं कालपुरस्कृतम् ।। ५.२२.२४।।।।
verses.text:
Ravana was qual to a black cloud, with big shoulders and neck with the strength and gait of a lion, 
glorious with radiant tip of tongue and eyes.

verses.sanskrit: आनीतासि समुद्रस्य पारमन्यैर्दुरासदम् ।रावणान्तःपुरं घोरं प्रविष्टा चासि मैथिलि ।। ५.२२.२५।।।।
verses.text:
He was tall with moving front portion of crown, with excellent garlands and anointments, wearing 
red garlands and clothes, with ornaments made of refined gold.

verses.sanskrit: रावणस्य गृहे रुधा अस्माभिस्तु सुरक्षिता ।न त्वां शक्तः परित्रातुमपि साक्षात्पुरन्दरः ।। ५.२२.२६।।।।
verses.text: Like Mount Mandara tied by Vasuki for producing nectar, Ravana was well tied by a black big thread.

verses.sanskrit: कुरुष्व हितवादिन्या वचनं मम मैथिलि ।अलमश्रुप्रपातेन त्यज शोकमनर्थकम् ।। ५.२२.२७।।।।
verses.text:
Equalling a mountain the king of ogres shone with those perfect shoulders like Mount Mandara with 
its peaks.

verses.sanskrit: भज प्रीतिं प्रहर्षं च त्यजैतां नित्यदैन्यताम् ।सीते राक्षसराजेन सह क्रीड यथासुखम् ।। ५.२२.२८।।।।
verses.text:
With the color of just risen sun, decorated by earrings, he was like a mountain with Ashoka trees 
with red flowers and shoots.

verses.sanskrit: जानासि हि यथा भीरु स्त्रीणां यौवनमध्रुवम् ।यावन्न ते व्यतिक्रामेत्तावत्सुखमवाप्नुहि ।। ५.२२.२९।।।।
verses.text:
Equalling a Kalpavriksha he was like the embodiment of spring season. Like a funeral mound in a 
grave-yard was horrible even though decorated.

verses.sanskrit: उद्यानानि च रम्याणि पर्वतोपवनानि च ।सह राक्षसराजेन चर त्वं मदिरेक्षणे ।। ५.२२.३०।।।।
verses.text: With red eyes due to anger Ravana was looking at Seetha sighing like a serpant and spoke to Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: स्त्रीसहस्राणि ते सप्त वशे स्थास्यन्ति सुन्दरि ।रावणं भज भर्तारं भर्तारं सर्वरक्षसाम् ।। ५.२२.३१।।।।
verses.text:
O foloower of Rama posessing bad conduct, without wealth! Now I will destroy you like sun destroying 
morning twilight with light.

verses.sanskrit: उत्पाट्य वा ते हृदयं भक्षयिष्यामि मैथिलि ।यदि मे व्याहृतं वाक्यं न यथावत्करिष्यसि ।। ५.२२.३२।।।।
verses.text:
The king Ravana who causes enemies to cry thus speaking to Seetha, thereafter ordered all ogre 
women with horrible appearances.

verses.sanskrit: ततश्चण्डोदरी नाम राक्षसी क्रूरदर्शना ।भ्रामयन्ती महच्छूलमिदं वचनमब्रवीत् ।। ५.२२.३३।।।।
verses.text:
Ravana ordered one with a single eye, one with a single ear and one with ears as covering, one 
with cow's wars, one with ears of an elephant, one with dangling ears, one without ears and one with the feet 
of an elephant and one with the feet of a horse, one with feet of a cow,one with hair over feet, one with a single 
eye and one with a single foot, one with big feet, one without feet, one with a big head and neck,one with big 
breasts and stomach, and one with big mouth and eyes, one with a long tongue, one without tongue, one without 
nose, one with the face of a lion, one with the face of a cow,one with the face of a pig.

verses.sanskrit: इमां हरिणलोकाक्षीं त्रासोत्कम्पपयोधराम् ।रावणेन हृतां दृष्ट्वा दौर्हृदो मे महानभूत् ।। ५.२२.३४।।।।
यकृत्प्लीहमथोत्पीडं हृदयं च सबन्धनम् ।अन्त्राण्यपि तथा शीर्षं खादेयमिति मे मतिः ।। ५.२२.३५।।।।
ततस्तु प्रघसा नाम राक्षसी वाक्यमब्रवीत् ।कण्ठमस्या नृशंसायाः पीडयामः किमास्यते ।। ५.२२.३६।।।।
verses.text:
"O ogres! How the daughter of Janaka, Seetha becomes under my control quickly, thus all of you 
together do that task."

verses.sanskrit: निवेद्यतां ततो राज्ञे मानुषी सा मृतेति ह ।नात्र कश्चन सन्देहः खादतेति स वक्ष्यति ।। ५.२२.३७।।।।
verses.text:
"With hostile and favourable tasks, with kind words, with gifts and dividing words and exertion 
of punishment, bring Seetha under my possession."

verses.sanskrit: ततस्त्वजामुखी नाम राक्षसी वाक्यमब्रवीत् ।विशस्येमां ततः सर्वान्समान्कुरुत पीलुकान् ।। ५.२२.३८।।।।
verses.text: Ravana thus ordered again and again with a mind full of lust and anger frightened Seetha.

verses.sanskrit: विभजाम ततः सर्वा विवादो मे न रोचते ।पेयमानीयतां क्षिप्रं माल्यं च विविधं बहु ।। ५.२२.३९।।।।
verses.text: Thereafter an ogre named Dhanyamalini quickly neared Ravana, embraced him and spoke these words.

verses.sanskrit: ततः शूर्पणखा नाम राक्षसी वाक्यमब्रवीत् ।अजामुखा यदुक्तं हि तदेव मम रोचते ।। ५.२२.४०।।।।
verses.text:
"O king! Sport with me. O lord of ogres! Of what use to you is this Seetha who is colorless and 
a wreched human."

verses.sanskrit: सुरा चानीयतां क्षिप्रं सर्वशोकविनाशिनी ।मानुषं मांसमासाद्य नृत्यामोऽथ निकुम्भिलाम् ।। ५.२२.४१।।।।
verses.text:
"O king! Lord Barhma did not assign to Her wonderful best luxuries earned by the might of your 
arms. This is definite."

verses.sanskrit: एवं सम्भर्त्स्यमाना सा सीता सुरसुतोपमा ।राक्षसीभिः सुघोराभिर्धैर्यमुत्सृज्य रोदिति ।। ५.२२.४२।।
verses.text:
"The body of one who desires a woman without desire suffers pain. Good happiness will occur to 
one who loves a woman who desires him."
